title: Tick Manager
description: A server performance optimization tool that automatically manages the server's random tick speed based on player presence.
body:
# Performance Optimizer - Tick Manager
Looking to keep your server frozen when no one's around? Tick Manager is a lightweight datapack that automatically manages your server's random tick speed based on player activity.

## What does it do?
When your server is empty, Tick Manager automatically freezes random ticks to reduce unnecessary processing. As soon as a player joins, it instantly restores normal tick speed for a seamless gameplay experience. No configuration needed - it just works!

## Key Features:
- Automatically freezes random ticks after 1 minute of server inactivity
- Instantly unfreezes when players join
- Server console logging for easy monitoring
- Zero impact on gameplay - players won't notice a thing!
- Super lightweight - uses minimal server resources

## Why should you use it?
If you're running a small server or just want to stop time progression during off-hours, this datapack is perfect for you. It's especially useful for:

- Private servers that aren't active 24/7
- Server hosts looking to reduce resource usage
- Anyone wanting to optimize server performance

## Technical Details:

Works with Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.x
Uses scoreboard objectives and gamerules
No configuration required
Compatible with other datapacks and mods

**Keep your server running efficiently without the hassle of manual management. Just drop it in your datapacks folder and you're good to go!**

_Note: This datapack modifies the randomTickSpeed gamerule. It sets it to 0 when no players are online and restores it to 3 (default) when players join. Generated using Claude 3.5 Sonnet._
